sections.paragraph:
διαϑήϰη, ης, ἡ [διά, τίϑημι; gener. of a formal arrangement or agreement for disposing of someth. in a manner assuring continuity] covenant

—a. with focus on testamentary aspect last will and testament Gal 3:15; Hb 9:16f.

—b. with focus on OT perspective of God’s unilaterally assumed obligation to confer a special blessing Mt 26:28; Lk 1:72; Ac 7:8; Ro 9:4 (pl.); 2 Cor 3:6; Eph 2:12 (pl.); Hb 7:22 and oft.; Rv 11:19.
